title: Basic Container Query
description: Create a card that switches from stacked to side-by-side layout when the container is wider than 400px.
hint: Use container-type: inline-size on parent and @container (min-width: 400px).
solution: .card-wrapper { container-type: inline-size; } .card { display: grid; gap: 12px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; } @container (min-width: 400px) { .card { grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr; } }

title: Container Typography
description: Use cqi units to make heading text scale with container width.
hint: Use font-size with cqi units and clamp().

title: Named Container Query
description: Create two different container types (sidebar and main) with different query breakpoints.
hint: Use container-name to target specific containers.
startingCode: .sidebar { container-type: inline-size; container-name: sidebar; } .main { container-type: inline-size; container-name: main; }

title: Responsive Dashboard Widget
description: Build a dashboard widget that displays in single, double, or triple column layouts based on its container width.
solution: .widget-container { container-type: inline-size; } .widget { display: grid; gap: 12px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; } @container (min-width: 400px) { .widget { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } } @container (min-width: 700px) { .widget { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; } }
